settings.presets.title: Quick Start Presets
settings.presets.help: Choose a preset and fine-tune individual values if needed.
settings.presets.standardHint: Balanced setup for normal daily operation.
settings.presets.strictHint: Higher safety and stricter quality requirements.
settings.presets.availabilityHint: More bookable times and faster automatic assignment.
settings.pricing.help: Define how taxes and rounding are applied during pricing.
settings.pricing.roundingStepHint: Defines the CHF step used for rounding.
settings.pricing.roundingModeHint: Recommended: every step, for consistent subtotals.
settings.scheduling.help: Configure when appointments can be booked and the spacing between them.
settings.scheduling.workdaysHint: Select all weekdays when appointments are allowed.
settings.scheduling.workHoursByDayHint: Enable days and set start/end time per day.
settings.scheduling.holidaysHint: No appointments are offered on these days.
settings.assignment.help: Configure how strict the automatic photographer assignment should be.
settings.assignment.policy.strict: Only exact matches, otherwise manual decision
settings.assignment.policyHint: Defines what happens if no perfect match is found.
settings.assignment.relaxHint: Enable only if speed is more important than perfect qualification.
settings.assignment.minimumLevelsHint: Assignment never goes below these levels (scale 1-10).
settings.errors.vatRange: VAT must be between 0 and 100 percent.
settings.errors.workdaysRequired: Please select at least one workday.
settings.errors.timeFormat: Please enter a valid time in HH:MM format.
settings.errors.timeOrder: Workday end must be later than workday start.
settings.errors.slotRange: Time slot must be between 5 and 180 minutes.
settings.errors.bufferRange: Safety gap must be between 0 and 180 minutes.
settings.errors.lookaheadRange: Advance booking window must be between 1 and 365 days.
settings.errors.minAdvanceRange: Minimum lead time must be between 0 and 720 hours.
settings.errors.holidayFormat: Holidays must be stored in YYYY-MM-DD format.
settings.errors.dayTimeRange: For active days, end time must be later than start time.

landing.hero.sub: Packages for every need — from professional photos with drone to cinematic 4K video. Book online, delivery in 48–72h. No phone calls, no waiting.
landing.packages.title: The right one for every property.
landing.pkg.bestseller.sub: THE GOLD STANDARD IN REAL ESTATE
landing.pkg.bestseller.features:
10 property photos
4 aerial shots
HDR edited
Web full-size formats
Media delivery in 48H
landing.pkg.cinematic.features:
Portrait or landscape
4K resolution
1-2 minute clip
Ground / aerial combination
Dynamic editing & music
Media delivery in 72H
landing.pkg.fullview.features:
10 property photos
4 aerial shots
HDR edited
Web full-size formats
360° tour up to 199 m²
Media delivery in 48H
landing.pkg.modular.features:
Camera shots as needed
Drone photos & video clips
360° tours & floor plans
Staging & extras
No fixed package required
landing.final.sub: Choose a package, set a date, done — confirmation by email. No phone calls, no waiting.
landing.pricelist.title: Transparent pricing, no surprises.
landing.pricelist.sub: All prices in CHF, including professional editing and delivery. Travel surcharge calculated separately.
landing.catdesc.camera: Professional HDR real estate photos, edited and delivered in web & full-size.
landing.catdesc.dronePhoto: Aerial drone shots for impressive exterior views.
landing.catdesc.tour: Interactive 360° virtual tours — price depends on floor area.
landing.catdesc.floorplans: Scaled 2D floor plans from tour data or your own sketch.
landing.catdesc.groundVideo: Professional video clip with interior & exterior shots, incl. editing & music.
landing.catdesc.droneVideo: Cinematic drone footage as reel or clip, fully edited.
landing.catdesc.staging: Virtual home staging — empty rooms digitally furnished.
landing.catdesc.express: Express delivery within 24h for selected services.
landing.catdesc.keyPickup: Key pickup from the owner or property management.
landing.pricelist.note: All prices excl. VAT · Travel surcharge by zone · Live prices from the system
landing.final.note: Packages from CHF 399 · Available across Switzerland
